race.name: Einsiedler Skimarathon
race.tagline: Nearly six decades of Swiss Loppet tradition in the shadow of one of Europe's great pilgrimage towns.

vitals.registration: Open registration via Swiss Loppet / Datasport

climate.description: Einsiedeln sits at approximately 900m in the Swiss Pre-Alps. February race conditions typically feature temperatures from -8°C to 2°C. Snow reliability can be variable at this altitude, though the location has historically maintained adequate conditions.
challenges: Snow reliability variable at 900m altitude in warming winters
Pre-Alpine weather can bring rapid changes
Freestyle technique demands good skating conditions
Moderate altitude limits extreme cold protection

course.primary: A 25km freestyle (skating) course through the rolling pre-Alpine landscape surrounding the historic pilgrimage town of Einsiedeln.
course.surface: Machine-groomed skating tracks on pre-Alpine terrain
features: Historic pilgrimage town of Einsiedeln as race base
The most traditional race in the Swiss Loppet series

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: The most traditional race in the Swiss Loppet series with nearly 60 years of history. Good accessibility from Zurich and strong Swiss organization. Snow reliability at 900m is the main concern in warming winters.

history.summary: The Einsiedler Skimarathon was founded in 1969 and is the most traditional race in the Swiss Loppet series. Held in the pre-Alpine town of Einsiedeln, famous for its Benedictine abbey and centuries of pilgrimage tradition, the race has been a cornerstone of Swiss citizen cross-country skiing for nearly six decades. The 58th edition takes place in 2026.
notable_facts: Founded in 1969 — the most traditional Swiss Loppet race
Einsiedeln is one of Europe's most famous pilgrimage towns
Home to the historic Einsiedeln Abbey (Benedictine monastery)
Part of the Swiss Loppet series

videos.title: Impressionen Schwedentritt
videos.description:
http://www.schwedentritt.ch

Auf den herrlichen Loipen, von 3,5 Km - 22 Km, geeignet für jeden Läufer, egal welchen Alters und Könnens, erleben sie Langlauf in Reinkultur. Sie geniessen auf den Schwedentritt-Loipen eine herrliche Aussicht in die Schwyzer Berge.

videos.title: roleto Bikes & Sport AG ihr Spezialist für Langlauf, Velo, Bikes und Rollski
videos.description: Die roleto Bike & Sport AG bietet eine riesen Auswahl an Velos, Alpin Ski, Langlauf Ski und Rollski. In unserer Filiale in Schindellegi im Kanton Schwyz beraten Sie die Spezialisten der roleto Bike & Sport AG ganz persönlich.
